title: Bio Forge
body:
![Main](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/BioForge/BH_BioForge_header.webp)

![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/BioForge/BH_BioForge_description.webp)
---
Dive into a world of evolving danger with BioForge, where viruses are alive, adaptive, and deadly. Create, study, and combat unique pathogens using advanced tools like the Virus Analyzer, Vaccine Production Unit, and Chemical Synthesizer. Manipulate viral traits, craft life-saving cures, or unleash chaos. With version 1.1.1, BioForge now supports addon creation, allowing custom symptoms, mutations, debuffs, and more! Will you control the outbreak or succumb to it? (All info about addons can be found on wiki in systems tab)

Really recommended to play in multiplayer, but you can still enjoy it solo!

**Also be aware this mod doesn't work in LAN multiplayer it will just crash the game!**

**There is some mobs in mod containing natural spawning diseases (If you will use their blood it will not work in incubator!)
These animals are: Villager, Cow, Sheep, Horse, Bee, Axolotl, Zombie!**

---

# **BIOFORGE V2.0 is being developed at crazy pace!**

For more information join our discord server!

If you want to help me financially in making his mod here is a link to PayPal dontations!

https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=EVMKD7UENNCVJ

---
How to begin

- Craft syringe
- Craft test tube
- Craft barell press
- Make some sweet berries wine(1 glass bottle + 4 sugar + 16 sweet berries(It will take some time to brew))
- Brew from it ethanol(In brewing stand test tube + sweet berries wine)
- Disinfect test tubes(Test tube + ethanol in crafting recipe then rinse it with DI water)
- Take syringe into main hand and shift + right click or just right click on living entity to take blood
- Syringe into main hand + Disinfected test tube in offhand then right click to fill it with blood
- Create Virus incubator block
- Craft nutrient medium bottles
- Create catalyst vial
- Place blood bottle and catalyst vial in top slots of the virus incubator and nutrient medium bottles in lower ones
- Then wait
- Done you got your first virus!(Random Transportation type, Debuff Effects, Primary symptoms! Everything else on level 1)
- You can take it from bottle to syringe and inject into your self and then check with medical HUD(Because it has small stealth level) or you can separate it in centrifuge then analyze in virus analyzer or pathogen scanner
- Then you can check(For analyzer and pathogen scanner you will need this) for cure levels and mutations in virus testing chamber(For cure levels you will need Viral suppressor(25% chance to sucessfully research), Viral inhibitor(50% chance to sucessfully research), Viral blocker(75% chance to sucessfully research), For mutation levels and things you will need Mutagenic catalyst(25% chance to sucessfully research), Mutagenic serum(50% chance to sucessfully research), Enzymatic neutralizer(75% chance to sucessfully research))
- If you want to remove genes from virus you will need gene sequencer place a separated and analyzed bottle into first slot and empty gene bottle into second then you have every gene possible(For cures & mutations you will need to research them in virus testing chamber!)
- Then you will have full gene bottle you can upgrade/degrade in gene upgrader or you can place that gene in gene manipulator into blood bottle that has virus in it!
From there you have full control in your viruses!
- If you will have to stop it then you will need vaccine production unit there you will need to have every number and on/off things be fully identical to virus that you want to cure(Also for vaccine you will need viral blocker + antiviral serum + healing tonic)
- Also there is a slot in this machine that allows to copy existing vaccines so you can make a lot for you and your friends
- Also there is debuff, primary symptom, mutations, transport vaccines that can be used to remove/add certain gene from virus in you or other entity they can be made as blanks and then you will need to input gene that you want to remove/add into them in gene manipulator
- From there you can see everything else in JEI!

- Or if you have more questions please don't be shy go to our discord server!

- [Advancements no more](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-no-more)
- [Vic's Point Blank](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vics-point-blank)
